agent_explanation.hypothesis: Mid-range ATR (2.0 / 3.0) beats the prior trial’s tighter geometry on cumulative PnL for the same manifest and history.
agent_explanation.why_this_strategy: Prior fold favored wider stops; testing same signal stack with house ATR band mid-range.

indicator_values.notes: Manifest-driven; align with policy_spec indicators if PolicySpec lane is used.

agent_explanation.learned: Earlier trial cluster showed loss concentration when stop mult < 1.75 on this window.
